market.summary: KOSPI volatile due to geopolitical tensions (Middle East conflict/oil prices) vs. AI/semiconductor strength.
key_points: Goldman Sachs raised KOSPI year-end target to 7,000.
Market sensitive to oil price fluctuations linked to the Middle East conflict.
Semiconductor memory chip price strength remains a key positive driver for the index.

art.summary: Seoul's vibrant art scene sees major new openings and retrospective showcases.
key_points: Spectrosynthesis Seoul opens today (Mar 20) at Art Sonje Center.
Damien Hirst Retrospective ongoing at MMCA Seoul.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective underway at Hoam Museum of Art.
